resources.string:
Welcome, young witch or wizard!

 🧪 HOW TO BREW:
 Tap ingredients below the cauldron to add them to your mixture. The order matters — choose wisely!

 ⚗ BREW:
 When ready, press BREW to test your combination. A successful recipe will transform the cauldron!

 ↺ DISSOLVE:
 Press DISSOLVE to clear the cauldron and start fresh.

 ⚠ SAFETY TIPS:
 • Never mix Dragon Scale with Mermaid Tear without a Bezoar antidote nearby.
 • Nightshade fumes are highly toxic — ensure good ventilation.
 • Wolfsbane must be properly prepared or it becomes poisonous.
 • Always stir counter-clockwise when adding Unicorn Hair.

 📖 KNOWN RECIPES:
 • Liquid Luck: Moonstone + Phoenix Feather
 • Draught of Living Death: Nightshade + Wolfsbane + Bezoar
 • Veritaserum: Mermaid Tear + Unicorn Hair + Moonstone
 • Elixir of Life: Dragon Scale + Phoenix Feather + Salamander Blood
 • Polyjuice Potion: Mandrake Root + Boomslang Skin + Dittany
 • Amortentia: Mermaid Tear + Dittany + Unicorn Hair

 May your brews be ever potent! 🌟
